title: Licania licaniiflora
taxonomy: Licania licaniiflora is classified as a species of plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae, commonly known as the family of the cocoa plum or coffee bean tree. It belongs to the genus Licania, a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The Chrysobalanaceae family comprises around 600 species, with most being trees or shrubs. Licania licaniiflora is characterized by its unique leaf shape and white, star-shaped flowers. Further classification of Licania licaniiflora may involve its rank within the kingdom and its specific taxonomic hierarchy.
